pr_title: Expose profile fields on the presenter
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,9 @@
 class AccountPresenter:
     def __init__(self, account):
         self.account = account
+
+    def display_name(self):
+        return self.account.profile.display_name
+
+    def locale(self):
+        return self.account.profile.locale
